title: Fix react-hooks/rules-of-hooks violations in teacher_responsibility page
description: 9 conditional hook calls flagged by lint at src/app/.../teacher_responsibility/page.tsx lines 125-285. Conditional hooks corrupt React state across renders. Lint warns but does not block. P0 because violations sit in user-facing teacher responsibility flow. Action: refactor to call all hooks unconditionally at top, move conditional logic into hook bodies or render guards.
close_reason: Split into ClassroomResponsibilityPage wrapper + ClassroomResponsibility child. 11 rules-of-hooks warnings eliminated. Lint 35→25 warnings, typecheck clean, 733/733 tests pass. Commit 9beddac6.

title: Fix N+1 in public-data.repository getRoomOccupancy/getPeriodLoad
description: Public homepage MiniCharts triggers ~40-55 sequential prisma counts (1 per timeslot in getRoomOccupancy + 1 per weekday in getPeriodLoad). Each round-trips remote Accelerate -> dev hangs/slow page load. Replace with single findMany + in-memory tally and Promise.all parallelization.
close_reason: Fixed in 10ca9791 (N+1 collapse) + b5bc90ea (local docker DB swap)

title: E2E test env leaks PRISMA_DATABASE_URL from .env, routes seed/tests at remote DB
description: prisma/seed.ts:76 `import "dotenv/config"` auto-loads .env, which sets PRISMA_DATABASE_URL pointing at the remote Prisma Postgres / Accelerate database. prismaClientSingleton() in src/lib/prisma.ts prefers PRISMA_DATABASE_URL/ACCELERATE_URL over the locally-set DATABASE_URL when present, so e2e seeds and the test web server were silently running against the remote production-like DB. Symptom: seed fails with USER_ALREADY_EXISTS_USE_ANOTHER_EMAIL even though local test DB is empty (`docker exec timetable-test-db psql ...` returns 0 rows in User). Fix: add empty PRISMA_DATABASE_URL= and ACCELERATE_URL= overrides to .env.test and .env.test.local. Follow-up: consider gating the Accelerate selection in prismaClientSingleton on NODE_ENV !== 'test' to make this trap impossible.
close_reason: Fixed in 483dd8f0: explicit empty PRISMA_DATABASE_URL/ACCELERATE_URL in .env.test prevents .env leakage from routing seeds at remote Prisma Postgres. 12/12 teaching-assignment e2e specs now pass.

title: Cleanup and re-seed prod database
description: Run seed:demo on production database to refresh data.
close_reason: Local seed redone with cleanup. Prod seed remains user-triggered (destructive op needs explicit confirmation).

title: Remove 'as any' on Prisma groupBy in assign + dashboard repos
description: Two live-code type escapes bypass Prisma type safety: src/features/assign/infrastructure/repositories/assign.repository.ts:106 and src/features/dashboard/infrastructure/repositories/dashboard.repository.ts:351 both cast prisma.<table> as any to call .groupBy(). Brittle against Prisma upgrades. Action: investigate why typed groupBy fails (missing select? Prisma client regen needed?), fix root cause, drop casts.
close_reason: Dropped (prisma.model as any).groupBy() in both repos. Root cause: as T[] result cast triggered backward inference through Prisma InputErrors conditional type. Fix: fully inferred return type, removed unused local type aliases.

title: Decide fate of 2 stranded WIP auth-migration stashes
description: Two large stashes stuck on stale base commits (0e9451b, fa95b33). Both contain ~12k LOC churn: Better Auth migration, AGENTS.md rewrite, schema.prisma changes, password migration scripts, proxy.ts.old. Risk: stashes rot against current main; conflicts compound daily. Action: review each, land partial work as PRs or drop with note. stash@{0}=editable table+teacher CRUD+E2E. stash@{1}=subject credit type guards + auth migration.
close_reason: Dropped stash@{0} (auth migration superseded, Better Auth already live). Dropped stash@{1} (subject credit + mgmt pages on stale base). Salvaged credit-titles.ts mapped type fix before dropping.

title: Synthetic break for time gaps + all-timeslot row alignment
description: Time gaps between consecutive teaching slots (e.g. 09:40-09:50) had no DB slot, so the timetable header showed periods 02-03 touching with the wall-clock gap implied. Added synthetic break columns in shared/timeSlot.ts and AllTimeslotClient.buildTimeSlotData. Also realigned TeacherList + TableResult to share TableBody's per-row pitch (cell 60 + py 0.5 + spacing 0.25 = 70px) and moved TableResult inline as the right-hand totals column.

title: Multi-class display rule + seed teacher/grade conflict prevention
description: Display: joined-grade rendering should only fire for locked classes (assemblies); non-locked slots show single grade. DB: seed assigned every grade's class index 0 to MON1, double-booking teachers across grades. Switched to greedy assignment that tracks (TeacherID, TimeslotID) and (GradeID, TimeslotID).
close_reason: Display in b3a6b187, grade format in f280c74a, seed fix in d6eecbe7

title: Rework timetable header: separate teaching periods from breaks
description: Header period numbers currently include break slots, causing semantic misalignment (period 04/05 label what are actually breaks). Add Columns array to shared/timeSlot.ts distinguishing teaching vs break, and have student-table, teacher-table, all-timeslot render breaks as narrow unnumbered cells.
close_reason: Implemented in cc77e9b9 (Columns model + 3 page rework)

title: Replace SEED_CLEAN_DATA sample with full MOE rotation for 1-2568 + 2-2568
description: User wants real-life timetable data on local docker. Current seed creates 25 sample teacher_responsibilities + 45 class_schedules touching only M.1 grades. Replace with MOE_FULL_SEMESTER-style population that fills every M.1-M.6 section per the THAI_MOE_CURRICULUM_RULES.md canonical weekly hours (Thai/Math/Science etc.). Apply to both 1-2568 and 2-2568. Includes: (1) audit existing lowerCoreWeeklyLessons/upperCoreWeeklyLessons constants in seed.ts vs the rules doc and align; (2) refactor seedFullDataset to call the MOE rotation builder per semester; (3) keep E2E teacher responsibility (e2e.teacher@school.ac.th, ค21201, M1-1) intact.
close_reason: Done in 7bb0aeb9. SEED_CLEAN_DATA now triggers MOE full rotation: 522 teacher_responsibility + 1104 class_schedule across 1-2568 and 2-2568. Per-grade weekly periods 30 (M.1-M.3), 30/31/33 (M.4-M.6) — within 28-32 / 30-34 MOE bands. E2E teacher fixture preserved.

title: Review 8 playwright failure artifacts from Apr 21
description: playwright-report/ contains 8 failure .md artifacts + 6 screenshots dated 2026-04-21, unreviewed. Either real regressions or flakes. Action: open report, classify each, file follow-up bugs for real failures, document flake pattern if flake. Coverage stale: coverage/ dir last modified 2026-02-27.
close_reason: Reviewed all 8 failures. No code regressions. Root causes: 3× server-not-running (60s goto timeout), 2× storageState expired/auth.setup skipped, 2× missing seed data for 2567/1, 1× slow-render flake. Tests need: dev server + pnpm db:seed:clean + auth.setup.ts to pass.

Files: e2e/10-program-subject-assignment.spec.ts (3), 13-bulk-lock.spec.ts (5), 14-lock-templates.spec.ts (7), 14-security-pii-exposure.spec.ts (2), 16-publish-gate.spec.ts, 17-all-timeslot-ux.spec.ts, 18-admin-regressions.spec.ts (6 conditional). title: Stale smoke selector: critical-smoke.spec.ts:351 expects visible 'X คาบ|X นาที' text
description: critical-smoke.spec.ts:351 'Config form displays current settings' uses locator('text=/\d+.*คาบ|\d+.*นาที/').first() then waits for visibility. Selector matches 33 spans like '1/1: 30/40 คาบ' inside hidden MUI list items, so toBeVisible never resolves. Either expand the list or use a stable visible-by-default config-value testid (e.g. data-testid='config-period-count'). Smoke suite is otherwise green (61/1 after seed refactor at 7bb0aeb9).

description: 0 errors but 35 warnings: 7 react-hooks/exhaustive-deps, 6 unused-vars, 1 no-unsafe-function-type (Counter.tsx), 12 stray console.log in feature code, plus misc. Sweep file-by-file. Lower CI noise floor so future warnings stand out.
close_reason: All 24 lint warnings resolved: 0 errors 0 warnings. SelectMultipleTimeSlot refactored to useMemo, ProfilePage dead EmailSection removed, 12 other files cleaned.

value: test env: .env contains PRISMA_DATABASE_URL/ACCELERATE_URL pointing at remote Prisma Postgres. prisma/seed.ts uses 'import dotenv/config' which auto-loads .env even under 'dotenv -e .env.test'. src/lib/prisma.ts prismaClientSingleton prefers Accelerate URL over DATABASE_URL when set. .env.test and .env.test.local now explicitly set PRISMA_DATABASE_URL= and ACCELERATE_URL= empty to override .env and force the local docker postgres on :5433. If you ever see seed fail with USER_ALREADY_EXISTS while docker timetable-test-db shows User table empty, suspect this leak again.
